title: ReBeta
description:
A Mod trying to bring back the old beta features with biomes, items, special item, concept items and OG Textures!

New Items and Features are also being worked on to make ReBeta even more fun!

# Discontinued.
body:
# ReBeta

This Mod is trying to bring back the old Minecraft Feeling with OG Items, Biomes etc.
But not just the old things are coming back! 

New Items and Features which fit the beta style have been added!
Spice up your worlds or just get back that beta feeling with the old textures in ReBeta.
The Mod is currently still in development but the ground work is done and playable.

Currently supports: NeoForge 1.21.4, Forge 1.20.1
Will support in future: NeoForge 1.21.1
Could support in future: Forge 1.19.4

# Discontinued for now, may update in future.
